author: prakashpprasad
content: Hey <@914307919699406908> <@686695036733227017> I wasn't able to submit the application on time, but I was planning to work permissionlessly anyways as I dont need the stipend. Where can I find the calender for meetings and instructions on how to get started?

author: tmiychao
content: That's alright, if you want to participate anyway, no need for the application now. Everything will be shared here and details are in the repo, read the guide https://github.com/eth-protocol-fellows/cohort-seven
